title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Hiranandani Group

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Hiranandani Group
jsonLd.description:
Hiranandani Group has an exciting opening for a Real Estate Agent at our Aurangabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Hiranandani Group:
Hiranandani Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in GIS Tools

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hiranandani Group!
